name: FPP WLED API Proxy
author: Ben Benesh
description: Exposes FPP as a WLED-compatible device. Allows any WLED app (Lightbow, WLED Wiz, Home Assistant, etc.) to discover and control FPP's overlay model effects as if FPP were a real WLED device.

OverlayModelName.description: Name of the FPP Pixel Overlay Model to control via the WLED API

LEDCount.description: Number of LEDs/pixels in the overlay model

DeviceName.description: Name advertised to WLED apps via mDNS discovery

EnableUDPDiscovery.description: Enable UDP discovery on port 21324 (WLED-compatible discovery)
